texto: What a failure her life had been. Would she have lied to God if she’d had more faith, been more righteous? How could she possibly have a son at her age? And yet, if she had believed all along . . .
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jill Eileen Smith que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “What a failure her life had been. Would she have lied to God if she’d had more faith, been more r…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, faith, failure, com foco em reflexao.
